channel.title: Argus Changelog
channel.description: Release history for Argus, the hundred-eyed security auditor.

item.description: Fixed path-probing agents (ReconBot, CrawlerBot) reporting fake findings on SPA-fallback sites, plus the same false-positive class in AuthzTester, HeaderPoker, and Injector.
Origin-scope enforcement on every request, TLS verification restored, strict desktop CSP, Live Attack cancel button, --max-requests cap, and a pre-publish benchmark gate.
Fixed the Dashboard/Reports risk-band mismatch and Live Attack silently doing nothing; Settings can now pick your own local Ollama model.
The desktop app now bundles the Argus CLI directly inside the installer instead of depending on a PATH-reachable install.
